features: LUXURY FRAGRANCE - Since 1975, Milton-Lloyd have earned an unshakeable reputation for luxury perfumes without the luxury price tag. This warm and sweet premium ladies perfume is the perfect scent for the alluring woman

SENSUOUS, WARM AND MODERN - sparkling top fragrance notes of bergamot, muguet and water fruits give way to a heart of precious jasmine, velvety red rose and vetivert, with woody base notes of amber, patchouli and vanilla in this perfume for women

LONG LASTING LADIES PERFUME – Milton Lloyd Essentials No 6 womens perfume comes with a 6 hour minimum guarantee. It is the luxury oils, blended at high concentrations that promises outstanding quality and long-lasting performance
THE MILTON-LLOYD ESSENTIALS COLLECTION – A trending collection of luxury womens fragrances by Milton-Lloyd
MILTON-LLOYD LUXURY FRAGRANCES – Milton-Lloyd works with top perfumers, using the finest oils blended at high concentrations to create sophisticated, long-lasting luxury fragrances
description: Product Description Milton-Lloyd is a leading name in the world of fragrances, providing exquisite perfume for women and mens perfumes and mens aftershave, all at affordable prices. Based in London, Milton-Lloyd is a family-owned business with over 45 years of experience and a passion for creating luxury fragrance for women and fragrance for men. We believe that perfume oil is the key ingredient that makes the difference between an average ladies perfume or eau de parfum for men and an exceptional one. Therefore, we prioritise perfume oil over branding, advertising, and packaging, and we work with the world's leading perfumers to blend the finest perfume oils at high concentrations to create luxury womens perfumes, girls perfume, body mist for women, perfume sets, mens fragrances and parfum men feel great wearing, without the luxury price tag. At Milton Lloyd, we believe that luxury is inclusive, and our Essentials range of perfume men and women can both enjoy caters for every taste. It offers highly perfumed scents for every occasion. For women perfume should excite, and our Essentials range of womans perfumes includes fresh and fruity blends alongside rich and fiery fragrances. Our Essentials men perfumes and men aftershaves are equally diverse with fragrance notes ranging from citrus top notes to Amber and Sandalwood base notes. Made in England and beautifully packaged, our Essentials range looks clean and modern, making it a great addition to any fragrance collection or a perfect gift for someone special. Available in 50ml eau de parfum for women and eau de parfum for men, our Essentials range promises affordable, long-lasting fragrances for everyone. At Milton-Lloyd, we make aftershave men love and parfum women can’t wait to wear. We don't believe in throwing money into marketing our brands, but we do believe in delivering fragrances that speak for themselves. Try our products today, and you'll never go back to expensive luxury brands. Ingredients Alcohol Denat,Butane,Parfum,Linalool,Limonene,Benzyl Salicylate,Geraniol,Citronellol,Hydroxycitronellal,Hexyl Cinnamal,Coumarin,Benzyl Benzoate,Citral,Benzyl Alcohol, Directions Apply to pulsation points for a long lasting scent Safety Warning For External use only. See more
